# seerr_discover_slider (Data Source)

Get information about discovery sliders in Seerr.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Placeholder ID for the data source.
- `sliders` (Attributes List) The list of discovery sliders. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sliders))

<a id="nestedatt--sliders"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sliders`

Read-Only:

- `data` (String) The data/query for the slider (only for custom sliders).
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the slider is enabled.
- `id` (Number) The internal ID of the slider.
- `is_built_in` (Boolean) Whether this is a built-in slider.
- `title` (String) The title of the slider (only for custom sliders).
- `type` (Number) The type of the slider (e.g., 1 for TV, 2 for Movie).
